title: The Hipaa Security Rule'S Broader Objectives Were Designed To
source_filename: The Hipaa Security Rule'S Broader Objectives Were Designed To.docx

qas.q: What is the purpose of Physical Security Safeguards?
qas.a: To provide security for physical facilities, computer systems, and associated equipment

qas.q: Which of the following is true?
qas.a: HIPPAA regulations provide a federal floor for healthcare privacy and security standards. and The HIPPAA regulations DO NOT override more strict state laws

qas.q: Which of the following entities is NOT considered a covered entity?
Which standard is for safeguarding of PHI specifically in electronic for(PHI)?
The HIPPAA Security Rule's Broader objectives were designed to do all of the following EXCEPT:
qas.a: Mitigate Financial Losses from environmental hazards

qas.q: Which of the following is not an Example of PHI?
The administrative simplification section of HIPPAA Consists of standards for all following areas EXCEPT:
The privacy and Security rules specified by HIPPAA are:
qas.a: Reasonable and salable to account for the nature of each organizations, culture, size resources. Each organization will determine its own privacy policies and security practices within the context HIPPAA requirements and its own capabilities and needs.

qas.q: Penalties for Non-compliance can be which of the following types?
The Five titles under HIPPAA fall logically into which two major categories?
When should you promote HIPPA awareness
qas.a: The first step in the compliance process

qas.q: Within HIPPAA, how does security differ from privacy?
qas.a: Security defines safeguard for PHI versus privacy which defines safeguards for PHI
